---
title: "5HT data Summary"
author: "SawchukS"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      out.width = "100%",
                      warning = FALSE,
                      cache = TRUE)

library(metap)
library(feather)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

MD = projHCT::sheets$MD
cMD = projHCT::sheets$cleanMD

unique(MD$Cortical_area)

MD$Cortical_area = gsub("MTG", "TCx", MD$Cortical_area)

```

# No filter summary

```{r}

# macaque user input for experiments
output_cellsMD = MD[MD$cell_name %in% proj5HT::sh5HT$nnested_cells,]

update_cells = unique(sh5HT$mstrMac$cell_name[!sh5HT$mstrMac$cell_name %in% sh5HT$nnested_cells])

if(length(update_cells) == 0){
  print("zero")
}

```

```{r}
ggplot(output_cellsMD, aes(x = Species, fill = Species)) +
  geom_bar() +
  theme_minimal()

table(output_cellsMD$Species)

ggplot(output_cellsMD, aes(x = subclass_Corr, fill = Cortical_area)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~Species, nrow = 3) +
  theme_minimal()
```
